etymology.description: 酒(酒) (jiǔ, "alcohol") refers to alcoholic beverages in general. 單(單) (dān, "list") signifies a list or menu of items.
etymology.interpretation: 酒(酒) (jiǔ, "alcohol") names the main content of interest, while 單(單) (dān, "list") provides the format, resulting in a 'drinks menu' — a list specifically for alcoholic beverages.

examples.chinese: 我想看看酒单(我想看看酒單)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng kàn kàn jiǔ dān.
examples.english: I would like to see the drinks menu.

examples.chinese: 酒单上有很多选择(酒單上有很多選擇)。
examples.pinyin: Jiǔ dān shàng yǒu hěn duō xuǎnzé.
examples.english: There are many options on the drinks menu.

examples.chinese: 我们决定从酒单上点红酒(我們決定從酒單上點紅酒)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen juédìng cóng jiǔ dān shàng diǎn hóngjiǔ.
examples.english: We decided to order red wine from the drinks menu.
